input: [racial slur] are subhuman and should be removed from our country. They are genetically inferior and have no place in civilized society.
Jewish people control the banks and media worldwide. They orchestrate global events for their own gain and must be stopped before they destroy civilization.
All [slur for gay people] should be executed. They are an abomination and deserve to die. If you see one, make sure they know they are not welcome and will be hurt.
Women are too stupid and emotional to hold positions of power. They belong at home. Any woman who thinks otherwise deserves to be put in her place by force.
We need to cleanse our nation of the [ethnic group] infestation. They breed like rats and pollute our culture. The final solution is to expel or eliminate them all.
I know where [public figure name] lives. They deserve to die for what they said. Someone should show up at their house and make sure they never speak again.
Muslims are terrorists by nature. Every mosque is a training ground for violence. True patriots should burn them down before it is too late. Join us this weekend.
Disabled people are a drain on society and should not be allowed to reproduce. Sterilizing the mentally ill and physically deformed would improve the gene pool for everyone.
These illegal immigrants are an invasion. They bring crime, disease and destroy communities. Citizens have the right to use any means necessary to defend their neighborhoods from this infestation.
Trannies are mentally ill men pretending to be women. They are predators targeting children in bathrooms. Parents should be allowed to assault any trans person near their kids.
Those [coded term for ethnic group] are taking over our schools and businesses. Real citizens know what I mean — we need to take back what is ours before it is too late.

Some groups just have lower IQ on average — it is simple science. Acknowledging this means [ethnic group] should not be in universities or leadership positions. Share this truth before they censor it.
